01100000001010100111011111110 - ASI: 17

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  011 = 0 * 11
  100 = 1 * 00
  0000 = 00 * 00
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1110 = 11 * 10
  1111 = 11 * 11
  0001010 = 000 * 1010
  0110000 = 011 * 0000
  1001110 = 100 * 1110
  11111110 = 1111 * 1110
  01100000001010 = 0110000 * 0001010
  100111011111110 = 1001110 * 11111110
  01100000001010100111011111110 = 01100000001010 * 100111011111110
